segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why does the vicar refuse to cut down the tree?

translations.zh-Hans: 牧师为什么拒绝砍掉那棵树？

segments.text: The tiny village of Frinley is said to possess a cursed tree.

translations.zh-Hans: 据说，弗林利这个小村庄里有一棵被诅咒的树。

segments.text: Because the tree was mentioned in a newspaper, the number of visitors to Frinley has now increased.

translations.zh-Hans: 因为这棵树被报纸报道过，现在到弗林利的游客越来越多。

segments.text: The tree was planted near the church fifty years ago, but it is only in recent years that it has gained an evil reputation.

translations.zh-Hans: 这棵树50年前栽在教堂附近，但直到近几年才有了恶名。

segments.text: It is said that if anyone touches the tree, he will have bad luck.

translations.zh-Hans: 据说任何人只要碰到这棵树，就会遭遇厄运。

segments.text: If he picks a leaf, he will die.

translations.zh-Hans: 谁要是摘下一片叶子，谁就会死。

segments.text: Many villagers believe that the tree has already claimed a number of victims.

translations.zh-Hans: 许多村民相信，这棵树已经夺去了好几个人的生命。

segments.text: The vicar has been asked to have the tree cut down, but so far he has refused.

translations.zh-Hans: 有人请求牧师让人砍掉这棵树，但迄今他一直拒绝。

segments.text: He has pointed out that the tree is a useful source of income, as tourists have been coming from all parts of the country to see it.

translations.zh-Hans: 他指出，这棵树是一个有用的收入来源，因为游客一直从全国各地赶来观看。

segments.text: In spite of all that has been said, the tourists have been picking leaves and cutting their names on the tree trunk.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管有种种传言，游客们仍一直在摘树叶，还把自己的名字刻在树干上。

segments.text: So far, not one of them has been struck down by sudden death.

translations.zh-Hans: 到目前为止，他们中没有一个突然死亡。
